name: Mrs. Field's Linzer Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, ground almonds, baking powder, salt and cinnamon. Whisk together.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, cream butter and sugar. Add egg yolks, vanilla and almond extracts, and beat on medium until light and fluffy. Add the flour mixture and blend at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix.
4. Roll dough into 1 1/2 inch balls. Place 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet. With your index fingers, press an indentation in the center of each ball to hold filling.
5. Bake for 22-24 minutes or until golden brown on bottom. Transfer cookies to a cool, flat surface with a spatula.
6. In a small bowl combine jam and grated lemon peel. Place about half a teaspoon of filling into the center of each cooled cookie. If desired, sift confectioner's sugar over the cookies and place sliced almonds in the jam filling for an extra decorative touch.
